peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Boundary companies are retained only when margins and technology or channel evidence show a local industrial advantage that cannot be easily copied by a larger peer.
margin_and_technology_assessment: 2025 gross margin 14.71%; net margin 4.64%; debt ratio 65.80%. Margins are ordinary but battery recycling depends on channel network; compliant processing qualifications; hydrometallurgy; and customer closed-loop relationships. These are slower to copy than a normal precursor line.
analyst_response: Retained with monitoring. 格林美 is not retained as a stronger precursor peer than 中伟; it is retained for recycling and closed-loop resource recovery. The watch thesis fails if CATL; Huayou; or other giants capture the recycling feedstock channels and compress its economics.
calibrated_standard_implication: Recycling can qualify when channel control; compliance; processing know-how; and customer closed-loop value are material. Low margin alone is not a rejection if the network is hard to replicate.

High-nickel and Korea capacity are relevant but current margins and losses suggest weak bargaining power. Its thesis overlaps with 当升 in high-end cathodes and 华友 in integrated ternary materials.
